note: Honest coverage frontier. status: present = a runnable step drives real code and passes; pending = specified behavior whose driving step is not yet bound to the real code path; retrospective_gap = shipped without a driving test (must be zero for governed behavior). REQ-703 is BOUND (core/governance.AuthorizeRestamp, driven by TestSpecCodeLockstepAcceptance). REQ-701/702/704 are implemented in tools/specvalidate but remain pending until that hash mechanism is exposed as an importable surface a godog step can drive.

scenarios.name: A governed safety-critical file is recorded with a content hash in the lockstep manifest
A governed file changed without its owning spec fails the lockstep check
The lockstep manifest excludes no governed safety-critical file
A cosmetic comment edit alone does not register as spec drift
A semantic code change registers as spec drift
A re-stamp is accepted only via an authorized audited approval
An unauthorized re-stamp attempt is rejected
